title: ggplot2 Coursework
text:
library(tidyverse)

‚îÄ‚îÄ Attaching core tidyverse packages ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ tidyverse 2.0.0 ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚úî dplyr     1.2.1     ‚úî readr     2.2.0
‚úî forcats   1.0.1     ‚úî stringr   1.6.0
‚úî ggplot2   4.0.2     ‚úî tibble    3.3.1
‚úî lubridate 1.9.5     ‚úî tidyr     1.3.2
‚úî purrr     1.2.2     
‚îÄ‚îÄ Conflicts ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ tidyverse_conflicts() ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚úñ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
‚úñ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
‚Ñπ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors

exam_data <- read_csv("chap01/data/Exam_data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)


1.3.1 R Graphics VS ggplot2

Base R Graphics

hist(exam_data$MATHS)









ggplot(exam_data, aes(x = MATHS)) +
  geom_histogram()

`stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`.












1.5 ggplot data

ggplot(data = exam_data)










1.6 Aesthetic mappings

ggplot(data = exam_data,
       aes(x = MATHS))










Histogram

ggplot(exam_data, aes(x = MATHS)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20)










Scatterplot

ggplot(exam_data, aes(x = MATHS, y = ENGLISH)) +
  geom_point()










Boxplot

ggplot(exam_data, aes(x = GENDER, y = MATHS)) +
  geom_boxplot()










Facet wrap

ggplot(exam_data, aes(x = MATHS)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  facet_wrap(~ CLASS)










1.10 Coordinates

Default bar chart

ggplot(data = exam_data,
       aes(x = RACE)) +
  geom_bar()










coord_flip()

ggplot(data = exam_data,
       aes(x = RACE)) +
  geom_bar() +
  coord_flip()










Scatterplot

ggplot(data = exam_data,
       aes(x = MATHS, y = ENGLISH)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = lm, size = 0.5)

Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
‚Ñπ Please use `linewidth` instead.


`geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'











coord_cartesian

ggplot(data = exam_data,
       aes(x = MATHS, y = ENGLISH)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = lm, size = 0.5) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0,100),
                  ylim = c(0,100))

`geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'












1.11 Themes

theme_gray()

ggplot(data = exam_data,
       aes(x = RACE)) +
  geom_bar() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_gray()










theme_classic()

ggplot(data = exam_data,
       aes(x = RACE)) +
  geom_bar() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_classic()










theme_minimal()

ggplot(data = exam_data,
       aes(x = RACE)) +
  geom_bar() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal()
